name: Joker
effect: +4 Mult.

name: Greedy Joker
effect: Diamond cards give +3 Mult when scored.

name: Lusty Joker
effect: Heart cards give +3 Mult when scored.

name: Wrathful Joker
effect: Spade cards give +3 Mult when scored.

name: Gluttonous Joker
effect: Club cards give +3 Mult when scored.

name: Jolly Joker
effect: +8 Mult if played hand contains a Pair.

name: Zany Joker
effect: +12 Mult if played hand contains Three of a Kind.

name: Mad Joker
effect: +10 Mult if played hand contains Two Pair.

name: Crazy Joker
effect: +12 Mult if played hand contains a Straight.

name: Droll Joker
effect: +10 Mult if played hand contains a Flush.

name: Sly Joker
effect: +50 Chips if played hand contains a Pair.

name: Wily Joker
effect: +100 Chips if played hand contains Three of a Kind.

name: Clever Joker
effect: +80 Chips if played hand contains Two Pair.

name: Devious Joker
effect: +100 Chips if played hand contains a Straight.

name: Crafty Joker
effect: +80 Chips if played hand contains a Flush.

name: Half Joker
effect: +20 Mult if played hand contains 3 or fewer cards.

name: Banner
effect: +30 Chips per remaining discard.

name: Fibonacci
effect: Each played A, 2, 3, 5, 8 gives +8 Mult when scored.

name: Scary Face
effect: Face cards give +30 Chips when scored.

name: Even Steven
effect: Even-ranked played cards give +4 Mult when scored.

name: Odd Todd
effect: Odd-ranked played cards give +31 Chips when scored (A counts as odd).

name: Scholar
effect: Played Aces give +20 Chips and +4 Mult when scored.

name: Business Card
effect: Played face cards have a 1 in 2 chance to give $2 when scored.

name: Supernova
effect: Adds times played of this hand to Mult.

name: Ride the Bus
effect: +1 Mult per consecutive hand without face card. Resets on face card.

name: Runner
effect: Gains +15 Chips when a Straight is played. (Scaler)

name: Ice Cream
effect: +100 Chips. -5 Chips per hand played.

name: Blue Joker
effect: +2 Chips per remaining card in deck.

name: Bloodstone
effect: 1 in 2 chance for Hearts to give X1.5 Mult when scored.

name: Arrowhead
effect: Spade cards give +50 Chips when scored.

name: Onyx Agate
effect: Club cards give +7 Mult when scored.

name: Rough Gem
effect: Diamond cards give $1 when scored.

name: Baron
effect: Each King held in hand gives X1.5 Mult.

name: Shoot the Moon
effect: Each Queen held in hand gives +13 Mult.

name: Raised Fist
effect: Adds double the rank of lowest card held in hand to Mult.

name: Mime
effect: Retrigger all card held in hand abilities.

name: Dusk
effect: Retrigger all played cards in final hand of the round.

name: Sock and Buskin
effect: Retrigger all played face cards.

name: Hanging Chad
effect: Retrigger first played card 2 additional times.

name: Steel Joker
effect: X0.2 Mult per Steel card in full deck.

name: Stone Joker
effect: +25 Chips per Stone card in full deck.

name: Photograph
effect: First played face card gives X2 Mult when scored.

name: The Duo
effect: X2 Mult if played hand contains a Pair.

name: The Trio
effect: X3 Mult if played hand contains Three of a Kind.

name: The Family
effect: X4 Mult if played hand contains Four of a Kind.

name: The Order
effect: X3 Mult if played hand contains a Straight.

name: The Tribe
effect: X2 Mult if played hand contains a Flush.

name: Smeared Joker
effect: Hearts & Diamonds count as same suit. Spades & Clubs count as same suit.

name: Pareidolia
effect: All cards count as face cards.

name: Blueprint
effect: Copies ability of Joker to the right.

name: Brainstorm
effect: Copies ability of leftmost Joker.

name: Hack
effect: Retrigger each played 2, 3, 4, 5.

name: Seltzer
effect: Retrigger all cards played for the next 10 hands.

name: Smiley Face
effect: Face cards give +5 Mult when scored.

name: Walkie Talkie
effect: Each played 10 or 4 gives +10 Chips and +4 Mult.

name: The Idol
effect: Each scored [rank] of [suit] gives X2 Mult. Changes each round.

name: Triboulet
effect: Played Kings and Queens each give X2 Mult when scored.

name: Yorick
effect: X5 Mult after 23 cards discarded (scaler).

name: Canio
effect: X1 Mult. Gains X1 Mult when a face card is destroyed.

name: Chicot
effect: Disables effect of every boss blind.

name: Perkeo
effect: At end of shop, creates a Negative copy of one consumable.

name: 8 Ball
effect: 1 in 4 chance for each played 8 to create a Tarot card when scored (must have room).

name: Misprint
effect: +0–23 Mult (random each scoring).

name: Gros Michel
effect: +15 Mult. 1 in 6 chance to be destroyed at end of round.

name: Cavendish
effect: X3 Mult. 1 in 1000 chance to be destroyed at end of round.

name: Acrobat
effect: X3 Mult on final hand of round.

name: Mystic Summit
effect: +15 Mult when 0 discards remaining.

name: Stuntman
effect: +250 Chips. -2 hand size.

name: Bull
effect: +2 Chips per dollar held.

name: Bootstraps
effect: +2 Mult per $5 held.

name: Loyalty Card
effect: X4 Mult every 6 hands played.

name: Ceremonial Dagger
effect: Sells joker to right at start of blind, gains 2x its sell value as Mult (scaler).

name: Constellation
effect: Gains X0.1 Mult each time a Planet card is used (scaler).

name: Green Joker
effect: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard.

name: Square Joker
effect: Gains +4 Chips when played hand has exactly 4 cards (scaler).

name: Hiker
effect: Each scored card permanently gains +5 Chips when scored.

name: Red Card
effect: Gains +3 Mult when any Booster Pack is skipped (scaler).

name: Four Fingers
effect: All Flushes and Straights can be made with 4 cards.

name: Shortcut
effect: Allows Straights to be made with gaps of 1 rank (e.g. 10 8 6 5 3).

name: Drunkard
effect: +1 discard each round.

name: Juggler
effect: +1 hand size.

name: Troubadour
effect: +2 hand size, -1 hand per round.

name: Abstract Joker
effect: +3 Mult per Joker held.

name: Ancient Joker
effect: X1.5 Mult per scored card of a daily-rotating suit (random).

name: Astronomer
effect: All Planet cards and Celestial packs are free.

name: Baseball Card
effect: Uncommon Jokers each give X1.5 Mult.

name: Blackboard
effect: X3 Mult if all cards held in hand are Spades or Clubs.

name: Burglar
effect: +3 hands when round begins, lose all discards.

name: Burnt Joker
effect: First discard each round upgrades poker hand level.

name: Campfire
effect: Gains X0.25 Mult when a card is sold (resets when boss defeated).

name: Card Sharp
effect: X3 Mult if poker hand played has been played already this round.

name: Cartomancer
effect: Creates a Tarot card when Blind is selected.

name: Castle
effect: Gains +3 Chips per discarded card of selected suit (changes per round).

name: Certificate
effect: When round begins, add a random playing card with a random seal to your hand.

name: Chaos the Clown
effect: One free reroll per shop visit.

name: Cloud 9
effect: $1 per 9 in deck at end of round.

name: Credit Card
effect: Go up to -$20 in debt.

name: Delayed Gratification
effect: $2 per remaining discard at end of round (if no discards used).

name: Diet Cola
effect: Sell to create a free Double Tag.

name: DNA
effect: On first hand of round, if exactly 1 card played, add a copy to deck.

name: Driver's License
effect: X3 Mult if you have 16+ Enhanced cards in deck.

name: Egg
effect: Gains $3 sell value at end of round.

name: Erosion
effect: +4 Mult for each card below 52 in your full deck.

name: Faceless Joker
effect: Earn $5 if poker hand played contains 3+ face cards discarded.

name: Flash Card
effect: Gains +2 Mult per shop reroll.

name: Flower Pot
effect: X3 Mult if scoring hand contains a Diamond, Heart, Club, and Spade.

name: Fortune Teller
effect: +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run.

name: Gift Card
effect: Adds $1 sell value to every Joker and Consumable at end of round.

name: Glass Joker
effect: Gains X0.75 Mult per Glass card destroyed (scaler).

name: Golden Joker
effect: Earn $4 at end of round.

name: Golden Ticket
effect: Played Gold cards earn $4 when triggered.

name: Hallucination
effect: 1 in 2 chance to create a Tarot card when any Booster Pack is opened.

name: Hit the Road
effect: Gains X0.5 Mult per Jack discarded this round.

name: Hologram
effect: Gains X0.25 Mult per playing card added to deck.

name: Invisible Joker
effect: After 2 rounds, sell to duplicate a random Joker.

name: Joker Stencil
effect: X1 Mult per empty Joker slot (including itself).

name: Luchador
effect: Sell to disable current Boss Blind.

name: Lucky Cat
effect: Gains X0.25 Mult per Lucky card successfully triggered.

name: Madness
effect: Gains X0.5 Mult on Small/Big Blind selection (destroys random Joker).

name: Mail-In Rebate
effect: $5 per discarded card of selected rank (changes per round).

name: Marble Joker
effect: When Blind is selected, add a Stone card to deck.

name: Matador
effect: Earn $8 if hand played triggers the Boss Blind ability.

name: Merry Andy
effect: +3 discards per round, -1 hand size.

name: Midas Mask
effect: All face cards become Gold when scored.

name: Mr. Bones
effect: Saves you from death (at least 25% of required) once, then sold.

name: Obelisk
effect: Gains X0.2 Mult per consecutive hand without playing your most-played hand.

name: Oops! All 6s
effect: Doubles all listed probabilities (e.g. 1 in 4 -> 1 in 2).

name: Popcorn
effect: +20 Mult, -4 Mult per round played.

name: Ramen
effect: X2 Mult, -X0.01 per played card consumed.

name: Reserved Parking
effect: Each face card held in hand has 1 in 2 chance for $1.

name: Riff-Raff
effect: When Blind is selected, create 2 random common Jokers (must have room).

name: Rocket
effect: $1 at end of round; +$2 each Boss defeated.

name: Satellite
effect: $1 at end of round per unique Planet card used this run.

name: Séance
effect: If played hand is a Straight Flush, create a random Spectral.

name: Seeing Double
effect: X2 Mult if scoring hand has a Club card and a card of any other suit.

name: Showman
effect: Allows duplicate Jokers, Tarots, and Spectrals in shop.

name: Sixth Sense
effect: If first hand of round is single 6, destroy it & create a Spectral.

name: Space Joker
effect: 1 in 4 chance to upgrade played poker hand level.

name: Spare Trousers
effect: Gains +2 Mult per played hand containing Two Pair.

name: Splash
effect: Every played card counts in scoring.

name: Superposition
effect: Create a Tarot if poker hand contains an Ace and a Straight.

name: Swashbuckler
effect: Adds sell value of all other Jokers to Mult.

name: Throwback
effect: X0.25 Mult per skipped Blind this run.

name: To Do List
effect: Earn $4 if poker hand played is the chosen hand type (changes per round).

name: To the Moon
effect: +$1 extra interest per dollar earned.

name: Trading Card
effect: First discard each round destroys all single-card discards for $3 each.

name: Turtle Bean
effect: +5 hand size, decays by -1 each round (passive).

name: Vagabond
effect: Create a Tarot card when poker hand is played with $4 or less.

name: Vampire
effect: Gains X0.1 Mult per scored Enhanced card (removes enhancement).

name: Wee Joker
effect: Gains +8 Chips per scored 2.
